In the second volume, "Mikazuki Munechika", "Kogumaru", "Dotanuki Masakuni", "Hagegiri", "Hizimaru", and "Kogarasumaru" from the Kabuki "Toukendanbu" (sword dance) will be on display. The product will be available for order with a total of 6 types to choose from. This item is available for order with a total of six different types to choose from.

In the third volume, "Munechika Mikaduki", "Kunihiro Yamambagiri", "Sosan Left Character", "Yakken Toushiro", "Heshikiri Hasebe" and "Fudo Yukimitsu" from the stage "Tousen Ranbu" (sword play) will go on stage. The "Medinui kokuson: Sword Sta...

entries.title: IGDA Japan to Hold Indie Game Development Investment Seminar on April 8
entries.title_ja: IGDA日本、4月8日にインディーゲーム開発投資セミナー開催
entries.description: IGDA Japan SIG-Growth held a seminar on April 8 on investing in game developers and studios, discussing distribution for PC, home consoles, smartphones and XR devices.

entries.title: NMB48 Performance
entries.title_ja: NMB48 公演
entries.description: Idol** Live at NMB48 Theater on March 28-31, 2026. This is an event for **Otaku** with an overlapping fan base of **voice actors**. **Doujinshi** circles are also involved.

entries.title: I will trap the goddess! Musou fantasy of "Trap Master" who defies unreasonableness
entries.title_ja: 女神を罠に嵌めてやる！理不尽に抗う“トラップマスター”の無双ファンタジー
entries.description: Tadano Bastard "The Rise of an Abandoned Trap Master," written by Sora Hinokage, has been available for preorder on Piccoma since today, March 23.

entries.title: I will do anything to lead a scum life! Suruga Oniryu, "Spoil them, demon tribe!"
entries.title_ja: クズライフを送るためならなんでもします！鬼龍駿河「甘やかせ魔族ども」
entries.description: Suruga Oniryu's book, "Pamper the Demons," was released today, March 23.

entries.title: What matters is not aggression but love! Yandere Alien Loves Erotic Manga Artist
entries.title_ja: 大事なのは侵略なんかより愛！ヤンデレエイリアンがエロマンガ家を偏愛
entries.description: Noa Nioshi's book "Assistarian: Yandere Alien Wants to be Loved by Erotic Manga Artist" was released today, March 23.

entries.title: Report on Hirohiko Araki's trip to San Francisco in the latest issue of "JOJO magazine
entries.title_ja: 「JOJO magazine」最新号で荒木飛呂彦のサンフランシスコ旅の様子をレポート
entries.description: Hirohiko Araki's "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure" mook "JOJO magazine 2026 SPRING" was released today, March 23.

entries.title: A lethargic high school student suddenly finds himself with "one month to live" when an assassin catches his eye.
entries.title_ja: 夏元雅人「雀蜂」1巻　無気力な高校生が、殺し屋に目をつけられ突然“余命1カ月”に
entries.description: Volume 1 of Masato Natsumoto's "Jakubee" was released today, March 23.

entries.title: Commemorating the TV anime adaptation of "Nihon Mikuni," a campaign to distribute clear bookmarks is being held at bookstores nationwide.
entries.title_ja: 「日本三國」TVアニメ化記念、クリアしおり配布キャンペーンを全国の書店で実施
entries.description: A clear bookmark will be distributed as a bonus for purchasing the book "Nihon Mikuni" by Ikka Matsuki. This campaign is held in commemoration of the TV anime adaptation of the same work.

entries.title: In a world where the dead become monsters, two young girls embark on a journey of redemption.
entries.title_ja: 「死神聖女」1巻　死者が化け物になる世界で、2人の少女が歩む救済旅
entries.description: The first volume of Masayuki Shizaki's "The Reaper Saint," written by Yui Aito, was released today, March 23.

entries.title: Haruka Shiraishi & Yoshi Inagaki to appear in "Demon's Crest," anime produced by Production I.G.
entries.title_ja: 「デモンズ・クレスト」に白石晴香＆稲垣好が出演、アニメ制作はProduction I.G
entries.description: The anime "Demon's Crest" will be adapted into an anime in 2026. The teaser PV and teaser visual of the anime have been unveiled, and it has been revealed that Haruka Shiraishi will play the role of the main character, Yuma Ashihara, and his twin sister, Saba Ashihara, will be played by Yoshimi Inagaki. Production I.G will produce the animation.

entries.title: Anime "Charisma" to air in January 2027; visuals of Charisma and her friends huddled together revealed
entries.title_ja: アニメ「カリスマ」は2027年1月から放送、カリスマたちが身を寄せ合うビジュアル公開
entries.description: The TV anime "Charisma" will be broadcast nationwide on TBS from January 2027. In addition, a teaser visual and its unveiling video were also released.

entries.title: Inori Minase appears in "Chibi Godzilla Strikes Back." New theme song is a new song written by OKAMOTO'S.
entries.title_ja: 「ちびゴジラの逆襲」に水瀬いのり出演　新しい主題歌はOKAMOTO'S書き下ろしの新曲
entries.description: Inori Minase will appear as Chibi Batra in the TV anime "Chibi Godzilla Strikes Back," which will be on-air from April onward, and a trailer and new visuals have also been released.

entries.title: Anime "The King of Robbers," Miyu Irino as the future "King of Deceit" and Nobuhiko Okamoto as a hired thug.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「盗掘王」、未来の“詐欺王”役に入野自由、雇われチンピラ役に岡本信彦
entries.description: SAN.G, Yuns (REDICE STUDIO), and 3B2S announced that Miyu Irino and Nobuhiko Okamoto have been added to the cast of the TV anime "The King of Stealing," based on the original story by 3B2S. In addition, the first main visual, character visuals, and character introduction PV were released.

entries.title: Erina Iwata, a guest on the first episode of "Snowball Earth," predicts glacial-weather conditions.
entries.title_ja: 「スノウボールアース」岩田絵里奈アナによる氷河期風天気予報　第1話にもゲスト出演
entries.description: A video titled "Ice Age Wind Weather Forecast" from the TV anime "Snowball Earth," written by Yuhiro Tsujijiji, has been released.

entries.title: Dorikomi's new web manga site, Dorikomi+, will launch in late April, introducing new serials in advance.
entries.title_ja: ドリコムの新Webマンガサイト・ドリコミ＋が4月下旬に開設、新連載を先行で紹介
entries.description: Dorikom is opening a new Web manga site, Dorikomi+, in late April. A teaser site was opened today, March 23, and part of the new serial lineup was previewed.

entries.title: Once a legend, now a scum: "Nighthawk Again," vol. 1, about a former assassin who is both a smoker and a drinker.
entries.title_ja: かつては伝説、今はカス　ヤニカス＆酒カスの元殺し屋を描く「夜鷹ふたたび」1巻
entries.description: Izumida Fuyuki's "Nighthawk Again" volume 1 was released today, March 23.

entries.title: The prince of a very peaceful country loves depressing developments "Depression-loving protagonist vs. kind world" new serial
entries.title_ja: 超平和な国の王子は、鬱展開が大好き「鬱展開大好き主人公VS優しい世界」新連載
entries.description: Makoto Mashima's new serial, "Depression-loving protagonist vs. kind world: Reincarnation is too peaceful, so I set out on a journey in search of supreme despair," has begun in Overlap's Comicgarde. It is a comic adaptation based on a novel by Ishibi Ishi.

entries.title: Figure "Itsusen Shinkubu Mothbrow Ver." from "Azur Lane" to be released in November.
entries.title_ja: 「アズールレーン」よりフィギュア「逸仙 しん首蛾眉Ver.」が11月に発売
entries.description: Overseas manufacturer APEX-TOYS will release the figure "Itsusen Shinkubu Mothbrow Ver." in November. The price is 27,060 yen.

entries.title: Storm Spriggan from "Beyblade Burst" is now available in Beyblade X Ver. on March 28.
entries.title_ja: 「ベイブレード バースト」のストームスプリガンがベイブレードエックスVer.になって登場。3月28日に発売
entries.description: TOMY will release the "BEYBLADE X BX-00 Starter Storm Spriggan 2-70M" toy on March 28. The price is 2,300 yen.

entries.title: Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit]" from "Sosai Shoujo Teien" is open for reservation on March 24th; also pre-order Dreaming Style White Dolphin
entries.title_ja: 「創彩少女庭園」より「早乙女 瑠衣【桃桜高校・競泳水着】」が3月24日に予約開始ドリーミングスタイル ホワイトドルフィンも同時予約
entries.description: Kotobukiya will start accepting reservations for plastic models "Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit]" and "Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit] Dreaming Style White Dolphin" from March 24, 11:00.

entries.title: HG 1/144 Aluseus" to be released on April 25; BANDAI SPIRITS' plastic model schedule for April release revealed
entries.title_ja: 「HG 1/144 アリュゼウス」が4月25日に発売決定。BANDAI SPIRITSの4月発売プラモデルスケジュールが公開
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS released the plastic model release schedule for April.

entries.title: Vocaloid elementary school student "Yuki Utaiai" is sculpted as a figure in the song "Strong Wind All Back" by Yucopi.
entries.title_ja: ボカロ小学生「歌愛ユキ」がゆこぴ氏の楽曲「強風オールバック」の姿でフィギュア化
entries.description: Alice Glint will release the figure "Yuki 'Uta Ai Yuki' Strong Wind All Back Ver." in February 2027. The price is 8,140 yen for the standard edition and 8,690 yen for the Amiami limited edition.

entries.title: S.H.Figuarts Gabin Luminous" from "Super Space Cop Gabin Infinity" to be released as a product.
entries.title_ja: 「超宇宙刑事ギャバンインフィニティ」より「S.H.Figuarts ギャバン・ルミナス」が商品化決定
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS announced the commercialization of the S.H.Figuarts Gabin Luminous action figure.

entries.title: Capcom releases "Nemesis" 1/6 scale figure from "Resident Evil RE:3" in December. The pedestal is a transport chassis design.
entries.title_ja: カプコンから「バイオハザード RE:3」より「ネメシス」1/6スケールフィギュアが12月発売。台座は輸送筐体デザイン
entries.description: Capcom will release a 1/6 scale figure "Capcom Figure Builder Creator's Model Nemesis" on December 10. The price is 49,478 yen.

entries.title: Zoids] Action Plastic Model "RMZ-021 Shield Liger Mark II" is open for reservation in April.
entries.title_ja: 【ゾイド】アクションプラモデル「RMZ-021 シールドライガー・マークII」が4月に予約開始
entries.description: T-SPARK, Takara Tomy's hobby label for high-target customers, will begin accepting reservations for the action plastic model "RMZ-021 Shield Liger Mark II" in April.

entries.title: Tobika Osaki from "THE iDOLM@STER SHINY COLORS" to be released in January 2027 as a figure wearing "Gardien Amethyst" costume.
entries.title_ja: 「アイドルマスター シャイニーカラーズ」より大崎甜花が“ガルディエーヌアメジスト”衣装姿でフィギュア化。2027年1月に発売
entries.description: Union Creative will release the figure "Osaki Taika Gardienne Amethyst ver." in January 2027. The price is 33,000 yen.

entries.title: Hobby Japan Vintage Vol. 14" goes on sale March 23. Verified the kit of "Space Battleship Yamato" Bandai model at that time.
entries.title_ja: 「ホビージャパン ヴィンテージ Vol.14」3月23日発売。「宇宙戦艦ヤマト」バンダイ模型当時のキットを検証
entries.description: Hobby Japan released "Hobby Japan Vintage Vol. 14" on March 23. The price is 2,640 yen.

entries.title: Aoshima to release plastic model "1/24 Wild Speed JZA80 Supra" in August.
entries.title_ja: アオシマ、プラモデル「1/24 ワイルド・スピード JZA80 スープラ」を8月に発売
entries.description: Aoshima Bunka Kyozai will release a plastic model "1/24 Wild Speed JZA80 Supra" in August. The price is 4,840 yen, and reservations will be accepted from 14:00 on March 30.

entries.title: Big size SUGOI swimsuit figure! Hana Uzaki and Tsuki Uzaki from "Uzaki-chan Wanna Play!
entries.title_ja: ビッグサイズのSUGOI水着姿！ 「宇崎ちゃんは遊びたい！ω」より宇崎花＆宇崎月が新プライズフィギュアシリーズ「Eternal Romance」で立体化
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release prize figures "Uzaki-chan Wanna Play! omega Eternal Romance Uzaki Hana Sweater Swimsuit ver." and "Uzaki-chan Wanna Play!

entries.title: 3COINS releases "Quick Shot Bow," a target shooting toy, today, March 23. Shooting Toy with Target" using soft sponge bullets also released on the same day.
entries.title_ja: 3COINS、的当てトイ「クイックショットボウ」を本日3月23日に発売。柔らかいスポンジ弾を使用「ターゲット付きシューティングトイ」も同日発売
entries.description: PAL will release "Quick Shot Bow" on March 23 at the official mail order site of 3COINS, a general merchandise store operated by the company. The price is 1,650 yen. On the same day, "Shooting Toy with Target" will also go on sale. The price is 660 yen.

entries.title: Screamer, a battle racing game with anime-style graphics, launched today for advance access for pre-order purchasers.
entries.title_ja: アニメ風グラフィックスが特徴のバトルレースゲーム「Screamer」，予約購入者向けの先行アクセスを本日スタート
entries.description: Milestone today (March 23, 2026) released a launch trailer for "Screamer," which the company plans to release on March 26, 2026, with advance access for pre-order customers. In the trailer, you can see the characters and the intense racing scenes with the music of "Wagamama Rakia".

entries.title: 50% off "Metaphor: Refantaggio" and 60% off "Persona 3 Reloaded". Steam "Spring Sale" of Atlus titles is underway.
entries.title_ja: 「メタファー：リファンタジオ」が50％オフ，「ペルソナ3 リロード」が60％オフ。アトラスタイトルのSteam「Springセール」が開催中
entries.description: Atlus today (March 23, 2026) launched its Spring Sale for downloadable titles on Steam. During the Spring Sale, popular Atlus titles will be offered at heavily discounted prices, including a 50% discount on "Metaphor: Refantaggio".

entries.title: Iris Odyssey: Pandora's Girl" will be released on May 29. Fantasy ADV depicting the fateful encounter and adventures of a girl searching for her brother and a mage crime investigator.
entries.title_ja: 「アイリス・オデッセイ パンドラの少女」，5月29日に発売。兄を探す少女と魔導師犯罪捜査官の運命の出会いと冒険を描くファンタジーADV
entries.description: Ysnid announced today that Iris Odyssey Pandora's Girl will be released on Steam on May 29, 2026. This fantasy ADV depicts the fateful encounter and adventures of a girl, Fuka, who searches for her missing brother, and a mage crime investigator, Iris, in present-day Shibuya. An original ASMR drama will also be distributed on the same day.

entries.title: Xbox Play Anywhere Showcase report on ID@Xbox's hottest titles.
entries.title_ja: 「Spiritfarer」開発スタジオの新作「At Fate’s End」を初試遊。ID@Xbox注目作が集まったXbox Play Anywhere Showcaseレポート
entries.description: Report on the "XboxPlayAnywhereShowcase" held during the "GDCFestivalofGaming2026" in San Francisco, U.S.A. Let's take a look at the 13 exhibited titles, centering on the new "AtFate'sEnd" from ThunderLotusGames. ThunderLotusGames' new title "AtFate'sEnd" and 13 other exhibited titles.

entries.title: From game-related lectures to exhibits. Free event "OPEN GAME FEST 2026" will be held in Kyoto on July 11. Applications for indie/student works are now being accepted.
entries.title_ja: ゲーム関係の講演から作品の出展まで。無料イベント「OPEN GAME FEST 2026」，京都で7月11日開催。インディー/学生作品の応募も受付中
entries.description: Indie-usGames announced today (March 23, 2026) that it will hold OPENGAMEFEST2026, an offline event for all game developers, students who want to enter the game industry, and game fans, on July 11 in Kyoto.

entries.title: Marathon, the first end content zone, the Cryogenic Archive, is now available. Tense battles and desperate escapes await
entries.title_ja: 「Marathon」，初のエンドコンテンツゾーン「低温アーカイブ」が登場。緊迫感のある戦闘や一か八かの脱出が待ち受ける
entries.description: On March 20, 2026, Bungie unleashed its first end content zone, CryoArchive, in its PvPvE survival escape FPS, Marathon. Located on board the UESC Marathon, this zone awaits players for tense PvPvE combat, gear pursuit, and one-or-die escapes.

entries.title: DISSIDIA DUELM FINAL FANTASY" Advance Download Begins; Video Interviews with FF Series Creators Also Released
entries.title_ja: 「ディシディア デュエルム ファイナルファンタジー」，事前ダウンロードを開始。FFシリーズのクリエイター陣によるインタビュー映像も公開
entries.description: Square Enix today launched the smartphone game "Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy" for advance download. The service will begin on March 24. To commemorate the release of the game, a video interview with the creators of the previous titles has been released.

entries.title: BOATRACE FIGHTER," a collaboration project between "Street Fighter" and boat races, will be held. The first campaign has started.
entries.title_ja: 「ストリートファイター」×ボートレースのコラボ企画「BOATRACE FIGHTER」を開催。全9戦で展開，第1弾キャンペーンがスタート
entries.description: On March 20, 2026, the BOATRACE Promotion Association launched "BOATRACEFIGHTER," a collaboration project with the "Street Fighter" series. The event will be held nine times a year in conjunction with major races. In addition, a "Master-Disciple Match" event for "Street Fighter 6" is scheduled to be held on March 29.

entries.title: MACHINE CHILD," a girl-raising SLG by Asato Oyari, to be released on Steam on April 8
entries.title_ja: 大槍葦人氏による少女育成SLG「MACHINE CHILD（マシンチャイルド）」，Steam版を4月8日にリリース決定
entries.description: On March 21, 2026, Shoujo Knights announced the Steam version of "MACHINECHILD" for PC, currently available on DLsite, will be released on April 8 (Japan time). and other new features will be added to the Steam version.

entries.title: I-PRIVERSE", which is undergoing a major renewal of its live system, will go live on April 2, 2011. Team "Gallmageddon" from "Pripara" also makes an appearance.
entries.title_ja: ライブシステムを大幅にリニューアルする「アイプリバース」，おねがい1だんを4月2日に稼動。「プリパラ」のチーム「ガァルマゲドン」も登場
entries.description: Takara Tomy Arts announced today that the arcade game "I Preverse" will go live on April 2, 2026, with a please 1 dan. The live system will be significantly renewed, and the timing of when players can obtain codecs will also be changed. In addition, three members of the team "Gallmageddon" from "Pripara" will appear for the first time.

entries.title: 30 hours of "Persona 3" music streaming. No archive, one-night-only distribution event starts at 19:00 on March 27.
entries.title_ja: 「ペルソナ3」の楽曲を30時間連続配信。アーカイブなし，一夜限りの配信イベントを3月27日19：00にスタート
entries.description: Sega announced on March 23, 2026 that it will be offering "PersonaSoundStationVol.1:Persona3SeriesMusic30-hourLivestream" from March 27, 19:00 to 29, 1:00. This is an online event to enjoy Persona 3 music for 30 hours. No archived distribution is planned.

entries.title: Uma Musume Pretty Derby" new official program "Paka Live TV' #1" will be distributed on March 27, 20:00. A new corner introducing the racehorse that became the motif of the show will appear.
entries.title_ja: 「ウマ娘 プリティーダービー」新公式番組「ぱかライブTV' #1」 ，3月27日20：00に配信。モチーフとなった競走馬を紹介するコーナーが新登場
entries.description: Cygames announced today (March 23, 2026) that "Paka Live TV'#1," a new official program of the cross-media content "Uma Musume Pretty Derby," will be distributed on March 27, 20:00 on the official YouTube. In this program, the latest game information such as the next gacha update and story events will be shown.

entries.title: Align the marbles, erase them, and unleash your special moves! Now accepting crowdfunds for "Re;MATCH," a board game that combines falling puzzles and fighting games!
entries.title_ja: マーブルを揃えて消し，必殺技を放て！ 落ちものパズルと対戦格闘を組み合わせたボードゲーム「Re;MATCH」のクラファンを実施中
entries.description: A crowdfunding campaign is currently underway on Kickstarter for "Re;MATCH," a unique game that uses a fighting game motif and a console-like cabinet as the basis for a falling-puzzle battle. The game is based on a fighting game and uses a console-like cabinet.

entries.title: Kiln, a 4-on-4 online "pottery" battle game, will be released on April 23, with an open beta for the PC version scheduled to begin on April 9.
entries.title_ja: 4対4のオンライン“陶芸”バトルゲーム「Kiln」，4月23日に発売決定。4月9日からPC版のオープンβを開催予定
entries.description: XboxGameStudios announced that the release date for "Kiln," a new title in development by DoubleFine Productions, has been set for April 23. The game is an online multiplayer "pottery" battle game about creation and destruction, in which players build ceramic armor that changes in play style and abilities based on its shape.

entries.title: A live program to announce the first anniversary of "G-Genesis Eternal" will be distributed on March 24 at 20:00. Gauman Nobile distributed to commemorate the release of "Senko no Hathaway."
entries.title_ja: 「Gジェネ エターナル」1周年情報を発表する生番組を3月24日20：00に配信。「閃光のハサウェイ」公開記念でガウマン・ノビルを配布
entries.description: Namco Bandai Entertainment Inc. announced today that it will hold a "Roadmap Announcement Live Broadcast" at 20:00 on March 24th to release the latest information for the first anniversary of "SD Gundam Generation Eternal" service. In addition, new information on the campaign to commemorate the release of the movie "Senko no Hathaway" has also been released.

entries.title: Production of the second season of the anime "Hana Zakari no Kimitachi e" has been decided; Mizuki's school life enters its second year.
entries.title_ja: アニメ「花ざかりの君たちへ」第2期制作が決定、瑞稀の学園生活は2年目へ
entries.description: The second season of the TV anime "Hana Zakari no Kimitachi To" written by Hisaya Nakajo has been decided to be produced. In addition, a PV was also released to announce the decision to produce the second season.

entries.title: Sendai Kaiwai PV and new cast revealed for the third and final season of "Jyujutsu Kaisen" "Shiketsu Kaiwai Part 1".
entries.title_ja: 「呪術廻戦」第3期「死滅回游 前編」最終回に向け、仙台結界PV＆新キャスト公開
entries.description: The "Sendai Kaiwai PV" has arrived for the final episode of the third season of the TV anime "Jyujutsu Kaisen" (The Circumstances of Death and Destruction Part 1), written by Akutomi Gedo. It was also announced that Hiroki Toji will play the role of Ishigooriryu, Nana Mizuki will play the role of Takako Uro, and Yukihiro Notsuyama will play the role of Kuroururushi.

entries.title: List of manga magazines for sale tomorrow, Monday, March 23
entries.title_ja: 明日3月23日（月）発売分のマンガ雑誌リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce the manga magazine to be released tomorrow, Monday, March 23.

entries.title: Shirotan the seal will be adapted into a TV anime and broadcast from this fall, with Aoi Yuuki playing the role of Shirotan.
entries.title_ja: アザラシのしろたんがTVアニメ化、今秋より放送　しろたん役は悠木碧
entries.description: Shirotan, a tategoto seal character created in 1999, will be adapted into an animated TV series to be broadcast on TV Asahi starting in the fall of 2026.

entries.title: Wataru Takagi called Season 2 of "Doro Hedoro" "dense," while Kyu Hayashida said, "Please draw a cross-section.

entries.title: Crabmeat" crabbing under near-death conditions (Almost a Day Indie Pick Up!)
entries.title_ja: 死と隣り合わせの状況下でカニ漁をする「Crabmeat」（ほぼ日 インディーPick Up！）
entries.description: Today's "Almost a Day Indie PickUp!" introduces "Crabmeat," a first-person point-and-click survival horror game about a prisoner who is forced to go crabbing in the Antarctic Ocean to pay his debts. The game's unique control system, which allows the player to steer the ship and set and retrieve traps using only the mouse, and its unique horror storyline, in which monotonous labor itself becomes a source of fear, are highlights of the game.

entries.title: Luminescence! Roar! The ultimate MegaHouse figure of Godzilla from "Godzilla vs. Destroyer" in large volume, light and sound, "UA Monsters Godzilla (1995)" is reviewed in photos and video!
entries.title_ja: 発光！咆哮！『ゴジラVSデストロイア』のゴジラを大ボリュームかつ光と音で楽しめるメガハウスの究極的フィギュア「UA Monsters ゴジラ（1995）」を写真と動画でレビュー!!
entries.description: Den Hobby independently reviews the "UA Monsters Godzilla (1995)," a figure that recreates the near meltdown in "Godzilla vs. Destroyer! The heat emitting luminescence and roaring sound gimmick mounted on the 30cm tall giant are shown in the video! #Godzilla #UAMonsters

entries.title: GaoGaiGar from "The King of Heroes: GaoGaiGar" is now available as an action figure in the "ToyRise" line! Star GaoGaiGar" can be reproduced with the included optional parts! Now accepting reservations at Chara-Ani!
entries.title_ja: 『勇者王ガオガイガー』のガオガイガーがアクションフィギュア「トイライズ」に登場！付属のオプションパーツで「スターガオガイガー」も再現可能！キャラアニにて予約受付中
entries.description: From "The King of Heroes: GaoGaiGar" comes the "ToyRise GaoGaiGar" action figure, which stands approximately 18 cm tall and can be transformed and combined using three major Gao machines! Star GaoGaiGar for space use can also be reproduced! Now accepting reservations at Chara-Ani #GaoGaiGar!

entries.title: Tsunago-Plarail 16", a miniature-sized Plarail toy to be enjoyed, is now available from EFTIDS! A total of 6 types, including Nankai Rapito (clear color), Series 500 Shinkansen, and Series E233 Keihin-Tohoku Line!
entries.title_ja: ミニチュアサイズのプラレールが楽しめる食玩「つなごうプラレール16」がエフトイズから登場！南海ラピート（クリアカラー）、500系新幹線、E233系京浜東北線の全6種！
entries.description: Shokugan "Tsunago-Plarail 16" is now available from EFTIDS with a lineup of Nankai Rapito, Series 500 Shinkansen, and Series E233 Keihin-Tohoku Line! The Nankai Rapito is the first clear color version! #eftoys #plarail

entries.title: Water transfer decals collaborated by LEAPRO and Clade Hobby Works are now available! Ideal design for large mecha kits, such as cautionary tales and straight lines!
entries.title_ja: LEAPROとクレイドホビーワークスがコラボした水転写デカールが登場！コーション類やストレートラインなど、大型メカキットに最適なデザイン！
entries.description: LEAPRO and Clade Hobby Works have collaborated on a new product: 1/60 Design Large Caution A Decals! Designed for large mecha kits and scheduled for release in April 2026! #LEAPRO #Craid Hobby Works

entries.title: Hasegawa is re-releasing a plastic model of "School Desks and Chairs" that can be combined with 1/12 scale action figures to recreate a classroom scene! Each desk and chair comes in a set of 3 pieces, and no glue is required for assembly!
entries.title_ja: 1/12スケールのアクションフィギュアと組み合わせて教室の風景を再現できる「学校の机と椅子」のプラモデルをハセガワが再販！机と椅子それぞれ3個入り、組み立てには接着剤不要！
entries.description: Hasegawa reproduces the plastic model "School Desks and Chairs" which can be combined with 1/12 scale action figures and other items to recreate a classroom scene! The set of 3 desks and 3 chairs each costs 990 yen (tax included)! #hasegawa #plastic model

entries.title: New designs including a tempestuous face and a tearful expression are also included in the lineup! The second set of "Assassination Classroom" Mejirushi accessories for Kakusei-sensei is now available!
entries.title_ja: テンパり顔や涙を流す表情など新デザインもラインナップ！『暗殺教室』殺せんせーのめじるしアクセサリーの第2弾が登場！
entries.description: The second volume of the gashapon "Mejirushi Accessory" featuring only "Assassination Classroom" Kakusei is now available! In addition to the re-recording from the previous volume, the lineup includes new designs such as a tempestuous face and a tearful expression! #Assassination Classroom #Capsule Toy

entries.title: A round frog appears as a Mejirushi Gacha mascot! If you put it on your umbrella, the transparent feeling of the clear material and the frog will fit the atmosphere of a rainy day.
entries.title_ja: めじるしガチャマスコットにまんまるカエルが登場！傘につければクリア素材の透明感×カエルが雨の日の雰囲気にピッタリ♪
entries.description: Clear material frogs appear in the gacha figure "Manmaru Animal" series! The lineup includes four types, including the well-known Japanese "tree frog" and the "Bertsuno frog" popular as pets! #Capsule Toys

entries.title: New collaboration monster "Omegamon: "G" Fusion Mode" and other characters have been added, bringing the total number of characters in the collection to 58! The second "Digimon Pendulum COLOR" in collaboration with Godzilla is now available!
entries.title_ja: 新コラボモンスター「オメガモン：“G”融合モード」などを追加し、収録キャラクターは全58体に！ゴジラとコラボした「デジモンペンデュラムCOLOR」第2弾が登場！
entries.description: The second volume of Digimon Pendulum COLOR, a collaboration with Godzilla, is now available! Includes five new collaboration monsters, including Omegamon: "G" Fusion Mode, which evolves with the Joggles function! Now accepting reservations at Premium Bandai! #Godzilla #Dezimon

entries.title: Gyro Zeppeli from the anime "Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure" is getting a Nendoroid figure along with his beloved horse, Valkyrie!
entries.title_ja: アニメ『スティール・ボール・ラン ジョジョの奇妙な冒険』ジャイロ・ツェペリが愛馬・ヴァルキリーとともにねんどろいど化！Amazonで予約受付中!!
entries.description: From the anime "Steel Ball Run: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure" comes a Nendoroid of the mysterious outlaw "Gyro Zeppeli" who participates in the North American transcontinental race "Steel Ball Run" along with his beloved horse "Valkyrie"! Pre-orders are now being taken on Amazon! #jojo_anime

entries.title: Soul of Sole, a new project to meet tap dancers, holds member auditions.
entries.title_ja: タップダンスと巡り合う新プロジェクト「Soul of Sole」、メンバーオーディション開催
entries.description: Soul of Sole," a crossover male voice actor unit project that combines elements of anime, music, manga, and tap dance, has begun. The "1st term member audition" has been announced.

entries.title: Chopper from the drama "ONE PIECE" becomes a fluffy figure, hat removable
entries.title_ja: ドラマ「ONE PIECE」のチョッパーがもふもふフィギュアに、帽子も着脱可能
entries.description: From the drama series "ONE PIECE" Season 2, written and executive produced by Eiichiro Oda, a Chopper figure has appeared in Hot Toys' "TV Masterpiece" series.

entries.title: 100 Kano" third season will start in July. Teaser PV to hear the voice of the new heroine whose cast has not yet been announced.
entries.title_ja: 「100カノ」第3期は7月から　キャスト未発表の新ヒロインの声聞けるティザーPV
entries.description: The third season of the TV anime "Kimi no koto dai dai dai dai dai dai 100 no kanojo" written by Rikito Nakamura and Yukiko Nozawa will be broadcast in July. The teaser PV for the third season has been released.

entries.title: Rena Ueda's request at the final "Censorman" speech: "Me and my mom will be happy."
entries.title_ja: 「チェンソーマン」最後の舞台挨拶で上田麗奈がとある要望「私とお母さんが喜びます」
entries.description: The "Bursting Gyoen" of the theatrical version of "Chainsaw Man: Rezhe Arc," written by Tatsuki Fujimoto, was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, 2012! The final stage greeting" was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, with Kikunosuke Toya as Denji, Shogo Sakata as Aki Hayakawa, Hanabayashi Takahashi as Kobeni Higashiyama, and Rena Ueda as Reze on stage.

entries.title: Seiichiro Yamashita of "Dr.STONE" was so pleased that Yusuke Kobayashi of "Piggya" praised him.
entries.title_ja: 「Dr.STONE」山下誠一郎が喜びのあまり「ピギャー」小林裕介に褒めちぎられて
entries.description: An advance screening of the third season of the TV anime "Dr. Stone Science Future" by Riichiro Inagaki and Boichi was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, 2012, with greetings from the stage. Yusuke Kobayashi as Senku Ishigami, Goshi Suzuki as Ryusui Nanami and Seiichiro Yamashita as SAI took the stage.

entries.title: Maebashi Witches" theater compilation film will be produced! Special video release and mini live performance at AJ!
entries.title_ja: 「前橋ウィッチーズ」劇場総集編の制作決定！特報映像公開　AJでミニライブも
entries.description: Production of the theater compilation of the original anime "Maebashi Witches" has been decided. A special trailer was released.

entries.title: Daily life is transformed over a transplanted giant penis in the comedy play "The King's Crotch Crown Shines," vol. 1.
entries.title_ja: 移植された巨チンを巡り日常が一変、コメディ活劇「王たる股冠の輝きよ」1巻
entries.description: Watanawa Watashiro Watashiro "Kings' Crowns Shine" volume 1, originally written by Mishiro Natsu, was released by Square Enix today, March 21, 2012. This is a comedy drama that begins when a giant penis implanted in an accident turns out to be that of the next head of a famous family that controls the world.

entries.title: Drama adaptation of "That night, I had the boss's child" to be broadcast in April, starring Mirei Sasaki and Masahiro Moritsugu of Super Express.
entries.title_ja: 「あの夜、社長の子供を授かりました」4月ドラマ化、佐々木美玲＆超特急・森次政裕が主演
entries.description: The TV drama "Ano Yoru, Boss no Kodomo wo Materu Shitakatta" by Shiromiya Esu, based on the original story by Natsuno Moisture, will be broadcast on MBS and other stations from April 16, 2012. The role of Shiori Hanai will be played by Mirei Sasaki, and the role of Takahito Seko will be played by Masahiro Moritsugu of Super Express.

entries.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!" 20 kinds of "Sealed Exodia" jackets, millennium puzzle pouches, etc.
entries.title_ja: 「遊☆戯☆王」封印されしエクゾディアのジャケットや千年パズルポーチなど20種
entries.description: A total of 20 collaborative items between Graniff and "Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters," an anime series written by Kazuki Takahashi, are now available for pre-order at the official Graniff online store, and will go on sale on March 24 at the official online store and at stores in Japan.

entries.title: Key visual for the theatrical anime "WITCH ON THE HOLY NIGHT," Aoko Aozaki's sharp eyes in the center of the magic circle.
entries.title_ja: 劇場アニメ「魔法使いの夜」キービジュアル、魔法陣の中心で蒼崎青子が鋭い眼光放つ
entries.description: The first key visual and visual release video for the animated film "WITCH ON THE HOLY NIGHT" have been released.

entries.title: Anime "Tenbin" to begin airing in July; cast and staff announced, including Shunichi Toki as Hayato
entries.title_ja: アニメ「てんびん」は7月から放送開始、隼人役の土岐隼一らキャスト＆スタッフ発表
entries.description: The TV anime "The case that the innocent and pretty girl who transferred to a new school was a childhood friend who I used to play with thinking she was a boy" will start airing from July on TOKYO MX, BS Fuji, and other stations. The first main visual, main characters, and cast information have been released.

entries.title: Jewel princess who turns bodily fluids into jewelry, second life no longer exploited Story of a woman seeking freedom
entries.title_ja: 体液を宝石に変える宝石姫、2度目の人生はもう搾取されない　自由を求める女性の物語
entries.description: Gorokoro Mikan. A new serial by Mitsuki Sakamoto, based on an original story, "Jewel Princess of Return to Death, Enjoys Her Second Life. started on March 20 at the WEB Zenon editorial office.

entries.title: Ritsuka Saeki [School Festival Maid Costume]" combines the cuteness of a catsuit and tail with the sexiness of a bare stomach! Sosai Fes...
entries.title_ja: 「佐伯 リツカ【学園祭メイドコスチューム】」はネコミミに尻尾のかわいらしさと、おなかむき出しのセクシーさを併せ持った衣装！【創彩フェス】
entries.description: Ritsuka Saeki [School Festival Maid Costume]" presented at "Sosai Fes 5th" has a strong visual impact. The gray "prototype" on display this time is very appealing with its elaborate modeling and fun to look at atmosphere.

entries.title: New Tomica Cars: "Honda CB1000F" and "Nissan Stagea" in March! Honda's world-class motorcycle and Nissan's station wagon that took the world by storm are now available in Tomica!
entries.title_ja: トミカ新車 3月は「ホンダ CB1000F」「日産 ステージア」が登場！ホンダが世界に誇るバイクと一世を風靡した日産のステーションワゴンがトミカに！
entries.description: No.64 Honda CB1000F

entries.title: Beyblade X GP Final 2026 to be held in Bangkok, Thailand　Japan Tournament "BEYBLADE X GP FINAL 2026" will be held in October!
entries.title_ja: 「ベイブレード X」、2026年世界大会の舞台はバンコク！　日本大会「BEYBLADE X GP FINAL 2026」は10月開催決定
entries.description: On March 21, TOMY announced a variety of new information on the distribution program "[BEYBLADE DAY -2026-] Beyblade Latest Information Announcement Special Program. During the program, it was announced that the 2026 world championship "BEYBLADE X GP FINAL 2026" would be held in Bangkok, Thailand on December 12 and 13, 2026. This article will summarize what was announced at the distribution program.

entries.title: The sexy Chinese costume "Yakushiji Kyuon [Chinese Costume]" from "Sosai Shoujo Teien" is exhibited for the first time! Sosai Fes" package illustrations of "Accessory Set 2" and "Bonfire Maria [Combat Costume]" are also on display for the first time.
entries.title_ja: 「創彩少女庭園」よりセクシーなチャイナ衣装の「薬師寺 久遠【チャイナコスチューム】」が初展示！【創彩フェス】「小物セット2」や「篝火 真里亞【戦闘装束】」のパッケージイラストも初公開
entries.description: Kotobukiya is exhibiting the prototype of the plastic model "Hisato Yakushiji [Chinese Costume]" and other models at the "Sosai Fest 5th" event held from March 21.

entries.title: Beyblade X" announces collaboration item "BEYBLADE X CX-00 Evangelion Deck Set!　Beyblade with the image of Unit-1/Unit-0/Unit-2!
entries.title_ja: 「ベイブレード X」、コラボアイテム「BEYBLADE X CX-00 エヴァンゲリオンデッキセット」発表！　初号機/零号機/2号機をイメージしたベイブレード登場
entries.description: On March 21, Takara Tomy announced the collaboration item "BEYBLADE X CX-00 Evangelion Deck Set" on the distribution program "[BEYBLADE DAY -2026-] Beyblade Latest Information Announcement Special Program. It will be released in late August and priced at 7,500 yen. Orders will be accepted until 23:59 on April 20.

entries.title: Report on "Sosai Fes 5th", a school festival filled with illustrations by En Morikura! Sosai Fest" - Fan exchange, special dioramas, and many other attractions!
entries.title_ja: 「創彩フェス 5th」会場レポート、森倉円氏のイラスト盛りだくさんの学園祭！【創彩フェス】ファンの交流、特別ジオラマなど目玉もたくさん
entries.description: On March 21 and 22, Kotobukiya is holding "Sosai Fes 5th" at KOTOBUKIYA-Hall in Tachikawa, Tokyo, to celebrate the 5th anniversary of the release of the "Sosai Shoujo Teien" bishojo plastic models. Admission is free.

entries.title: Damaged fighting girl "Yakushiji Kyuon [Bonfire Maria Damaged Ver!　Appeared together with a fake with the same appearance, "Emulation" [Sosai Fes].
entries.title_ja: ダメージを負った戦う少女「薬師寺 久遠【篝火 真里亞ダメージVer.】」！　姿が同じ偽物、「エミュレーション」とともに登場【創彩フェス】
entries.description: In the "Sosai Shoujo Teien" series of plastic models of various characters based on the theme of high school girls, "Kyuon Yakushiji" is a character with a somewhat special feeling. She is an "actress-genius" who plays a variety of roles. At the event, two models based on the character she plays, "Yakushiji Hisato [Bonfire Maria Damaged Ver.]" and "Yakushiji Hisato [Bonfire Maria Damaged Ver.] Dreaming Style School Girl Emulation," were presented and coloring samples were displayed.

entries.title: The glossy texture of the swimsuit!　Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School, Swimsuit Race]" is a swimsuit with a glossy texture.
entries.title_ja: つやつやの水着の質感！　「早乙女 瑠衣【桃桜高校・競泳水着】」は顔に手を当てる仕草に注目【創彩フェス】
entries.description: At the "Sosai Fest 5th" held to commemorate the 5th anniversary of the release of the "Sosai Shoujo Teien" bishojo plastic models, a number of new items were announced. Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School Swimsuit]" and "Rui Saotome [Momozakura High School Swimsuit] Dreaming Style White Dolphin" were among them. The release date and price have not yet been determined, but orders will be taken on March 24, when details will be revealed.

entries.title: Steam Spring Sale 2026" - First Sale and Lowest Priced Games. There are also some recommended picks for those who want to take this opportunity to explore new titles.
entries.title_ja: 「Steamスプリングセール2026」初セール＆最安値作品まとめ。この機会に新しい作品を探りたい人向けのオススメ作品ピックアップもあるよ
entries.description: Steam Spring Sale 2026, the first of the annual large-scale seasonal sales held on Steam in 2026, has begun. For those who want to stock up on games they can play at their leisure before their costly new lives begin, we've compiled a list of the lowest-priced and first-sale titles for you this time as well!

entries.title: Yui's HoaeHoae Game Speech: No.261 ""Paranoma Site FILE38: Ise Mermaid's Tale", Impressions up to the middle stage & I want to talk about what I'm interested in in the future" *Spoiler Alert!
entries.title_ja: 結のほえほえゲーム演説：第261回「『パラノマサイト FILE38 伊勢人魚物語』，中盤までの感想＆この先で気になることを話したい」※ネタバレ注意
entries.description: The new "FILE38 Ise Mermaid's Tale" by my favorite "Paranoma Site" is too interesting!　I think I'm probably in the middle of the story.　Yui-san, who has reached the halfway point of the story, will talk about his impressions so far and the mysteries and deductions that interest him in the future. (We recommend that you read this article after clearing the game.

entries.title: ［Interview] "Living on a Deserted Island Somewhere" - A Worldview Linked to Reality - "I.ADORE" R01 Cast Talks about the Story and New Song "ARCANA
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］「どこかの無人島で生きている」現実とリンクする世界観――「I.ADORE」R01キャストが語る物語と新曲「ARCANA」
entries.description: I.ADORE" is about nine young men reincarnated on a deserted island and living together to become idols. Kaoru Mitsuhashi, Katsuya Fukunishi, and Kaoto Udagawa, who play R01 in this work, talked about the world view, their thoughts on the characters, and the appeal of the new song "ARCANA.

entries.title: TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026" is held today. On-site report on an indie game event that connects with the city.
entries.title_ja: 「TOKYO INDIE GAMES SUMMIT 2026」本日開催。街とつながるインディーゲームイベントを現地レポート
entries.description: TOKYOINDIEGAMESSUMMIT2026, an indie game event to be held today (March 21, 2026) in Koenji, Tokyo, will report on the atmosphere of the event through a look at the Business Day held the day before. The venue, a former elementary school, is filled with unique games from the first to third floors. Let's enjoy every inch of the venue so as not to miss out on any new gaming experiences.

entries.title: Kenji Iino's new "One-Dot Games" collection of five free games will be released on May 17.
entries.title_ja: 飯野賢治氏が着想した“1ドットゲーム”の新作「ONE-DOT GAMES」のリリースが5月17日に決定。5種類のタイトルを収録した無料ゲームコレクション
entries.description: From Yellow to Orange announced the release of its new smartphone app "ONE-DOTGAMES" on May 17. The price is free. The game collection is based on game creator Kenji Iino's 2009 "one-dotenemies" and includes five unique titles created from a single dot.

entries.title: Weekly Steam Square No. 145: Sandbox Survival "Everwind" and "DEATH STRANDING" for PC
entries.title_ja: 週刊Steam広場 第145号：サンドボックスサバイバル「Everwind」やPC版「DEATH STRANDING」が発売に
entries.description: This week's edition of "Weekly Steam Plaza" brings you information on notable Steam titles and sales that went on sale this week. This week, the PC versions of "Everwind," a sandbox survival RPG set in a skyworld where the sky meets the sea, and "DEATHSTRANDING2," an open world game in which you deliver packages and reconnect humanity in a world that has collapsed due to supernatural phenomena, were released.

entries.title: [March 21, 2026] List of Manga Books Released Today
entries.title_ja: 【2026年3月21日】本日発売のマンガ単行本リスト
entries.description: Comic Natalie is pleased to announce today's March 21, 2026 book release. Click here to see the list of magazines on sale today.

entries.title: Saint Seiya" will be serialized in a new "Heavenly Realm Arc" series, and "From Beyond" will be adapted into a TV anime.
entries.title_ja: 【今週の注目記事】「聖闘士星矢」の新作“天界篇”連載決定、「彼方から」TVアニメ化
entries.description: From March 12 to March 18, 2026, the most popular article in Comic Natalie was a news article about the new "Saint Seiya" "Heavenly Realm Arc.

entries.title: MG 1/100 Gundam Vulculus Extension Parts Set" is on display. Check out the power of the Valkyria Buster Sword [Gundam Base photo].
entries.title_ja: 「MG 1/100 ガンダムバルバトスルプス用 拡張パーツセット」が展示中。ヴァルキュリアバスターソードの迫力をチェック【ガンダムベース撮り下ろし】
entries.description: An expansion parts set for the "MG 1/100 Gundam Barbatos Lupus" is now available through Premium Bandai, and the first pre-order users received their shipment in February. Samples of these parts are now on display at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title: We took down the "RG 1/144 Gundam Base Limited Edition Gundam Epion [Special Coating]" which will be released on March 20. The brightness of the plating is very beautiful! Gundam Base new photos!
entries.title_ja: 3月20日発売の「RG 1/144 ガンダムベース限定 ガンダムエピオン [スペシャルコーティング]」を撮り下ろし。メッキの輝きが映える！【ガンダムベース撮り下ろし】
entries.description: Gundam Base's limited item "RG 1/144 Gundam Base Limited Gundam Epion [Special Coating]" will be released on March 20. A sample of this item is on display at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title: Plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Kamen Rider Shin-1" from "Kamen Rider" is released today!
entries.title_ja: 「仮面ライダー」よりプラモデル「Figure-rise Standard 仮面ライダー新1号」本日発売！
entries.description: BANDAI SPIRITS will release a plastic model "Figure-rise Standard Kamen Rider Shin-1" on March 21. The price is 4,180 yen.

entries.title: HG 1/144 MSN-04II Nightingale [Clear Color]" now on sale!　The large MS that appears in the novel is molded in bright clear red [Gundam Base photo].
entries.title_ja: 「HG 1/144 MSN-04II ナイチンゲール [クリアカラー]」発売中！　小説に登場の大型MSを鮮やかなクリアレッドで成形【ガンダムベース撮り下ろし】
entries.description: The limited item "HG 1/144 MSN-04II Nightingale [clear color]" released last August was reproduced, and a completed sample of it was displayed at Gundam Base Tokyo.

entries.title: Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Archeology, and Media Theory" (Book Guide for Gamers: No. 58)
entries.title_ja: クレーンゲーム100年の歴史をたどり直す労作「クレーンゲーム研究 系譜学・考現学・メディア論」（ゲーマーのためのブックガイド：第58回）
entries.description: The crane game, with its simple mechanism of manipulating an arm inside a box to drop a prize, has an indescribable appeal. Where did these machines, which are now the flower of arcade games, come from? This book, "Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Kogaku, and Media Theory," is a book that answers such questions.

entries.description: Today's "Almost Daily Indie PickUp!" introduces "TheWalkingTrade," a store management sim that sells supplies in a zombie-infested apocalyptic world. The currency is batteries, and you are free to help or abandon your customers. The chaotic store creation awaits you, where goods are blown off the shelves by physics calculations.

entries.title: What is this "knowledge unlocking" that we hear so much about these days?　Why is it called that?　What are some of the best examples?　Let us try to explain all the questions that come to mind.
entries.title_ja: 最近よく聞く“知識アンロック系”ってなに？　そう呼ばれるようになった理由は？　代表作は？　思いついた疑問を全部まとめて解説してみる
entries.description: If you have been following game information recently, you may have come across the term "knowledge unlocking" from time to time. Some people are vaguely familiar with it, while others may ask, "When did this term originate?　Is it a game genre? Some may even say, "When did this term originate? I've been thinking a lot about this extremely useful but not yet widely used term (genre name).

entries.title: Meguri Witch", a game in which you turn the witch's eyes around to unlock her secrets, is now available on the Steam store page. The story is told by arranging objects and scenery.
entries.title_ja: 魔女の目をぐるぐる回して，秘密を開錠する「めくるりウィッチ」，Steamストアページを公開。オブジェクトや景色を揃えて，物語を進めていく
entries.description: SleepingMuseum today released the Steam store page for the PC game "Meguri Witch". This is a game in which the player turns the witch's eyes around and unlocks her secrets. The player, along with the heroine, creates scenes and advances the story by turning the witch's eyes and aligning the objects and scenery in front of and behind her to unlock the dial safe.

During the photo session, a stuffed animal of Kakushi Sensei also made an appearance.

entries.title: Little Kitty Big City" will be released by SEGA on June 18 for the Switch as a packaged version.
entries.title_ja: 「リトルキティ・ビッグシティ〜まいごの子猫の街さんぽ〜」，Switch向けパッケージ版が6月18日にセガからリリース
entries.description: On March 19, 2026, Sega announced that a packaged version of "Little Kitty Big City - Maigo no Kitten no Machi Sanpo" for Switch will be released on June 18. The price is 3980 yen (including tax). The game is a casual adventure game in which the main character, a black cat who has become separated from her owner, wanders around an open-world city, trying to return home.

entries.title: AYANEO Pocket S mini, a compact portable Android game console with an approx. 4.2-inch size display, goes on sale in Japan on March 26.

entries.description: On March 19, 2026, Tenku announced the release of AYANEO's AYANEOPocketSmin "i portable Android gaming device on March 26. The highlight of this product is its small body with an LCD display of approximately 4.2 inches in size, with a resolution of 1280 x 960 dots and an aspect ratio of 4:3. The price, including tax, starts at 77,800 yen.

entries.title: First-person horror fishing sim "Out Fishing" demo version available! Take your time fishing by the lake where the disappearance took place. After sunset, an unidentifiable horror looms!

entries.title: Scratchy Scratchy" is now available on Steam! Scritchy Scratchy" is now available on Steam!

entries.title: Westerners don't understand that for Japanese people, it is more Japanese and nicer to have simple English words in the UI." It is not enough to translate all the English contained in the game... A lively discussion around social networking sites.

entries.title: Lead an interstellar freighter through the galaxy. New Sci-Fi Rogue RPG "Stellar Freight: Endless Horizon" to be Released in Q3 2026

entries.description: TwoCakesStudio today announced the release of "Stellar Freighter: Endless Horizon," a new title developed by Satellite235, for release in Q3 2026, with a Steam store page. The game is a sci-fi roguelike turn-based RPG in which players captain an interstellar freighter and lead their crew through the perils of space.

entries.title: Gameplay footage of "EXODUS," an epic sci-fi action RPG set 40,000 years in the future, scheduled for release in early 2027!

entries.title: Unity Studio, the official Unity editor for creating 3D apps in the browser, is officially released. Free trial is now available.
entries.title_ja: ブラウザで3Dアプリを作れるUnity公式エディター「Unity Studio」正式リリース。無料トライアルも提供中
entries.description:
Official Release of Unity Studio, an Official Unity Tool for Creating 3D Applications in the Browser
No-code animation application, UI creation, etc. are possible. In addition to paid licenses, free trials are also available.
Available for WebGPU compatible browsers (Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.). Mobile browsers are not supported at the time of the announcement.

entries.title: KAZUMA KANEKO'S TSUQUYOMI" reveals five playable characters and battle styles. Enjoy the story depicted from the viewpoints of the agent and the mastermind.

This time, five playable characters including "Tsukuyomi of the Sixteen Nights Moon" and "Tsukuyomi of the New Moon," their battle styles, and the contents of the story mode were revealed.

entries.title: The official website for the rogue light action "Kunio's Hot-Blooded Journey to the West: Jersey Rampage" is now open. Sun Wukong, Inoha-kai, Sa-go-jyo, and Sanzo Houshi are all "Kunio".

entries.description: Arc System Works today unveiled the official website for "Kuniokun no Nekketsu Saiyuki Tenjiku Ranbutsu Hen," which the company plans to release within 2026. This is a roguelite action game based on the "Journey to the West," one of the four great Chinese classic books. The characters Sun Wukong, Inoha-kai, Sa-go-jyo, and Sanzo Houshi are all "Kunio" in the game.
entries.series: Kunio's Hot-Blooded Journey to the West: Jersey Rampage

entries.title: Blender 5.1" is officially released. Bone Info" node for procedural rigging with enhanced linkage between armature and geometry nodes, etc. implemented.
entries.title_ja: 「Blender 5.1」正式リリース。アーマチュアとジオメトリノードの連携強化によりプロシージャルリギングを実現する「Bone Info」ノードなどが実装
entries.description:
March 17, 2026 (local time), the official release of Blender 5.1
Bone Info, an Input node that allows users to obtain transformation information from bones in armatures, has been added to the Geometry node.
Improved processing speed of shape keys and actions, and enhanced grease pencil fill functionality have also been implemented.

entries.title: GIMP 3.2, an open source image editing tool, is officially released. New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.
entries.title_ja: オープンソースの画像編集ツール「GIMP 3.2」正式リリース。新たな非破壊レイヤー「リンクレイヤー」「ベクターレイヤー」が実装
entries.description:
GIMP, an Open Source Image Editing Tool, Updated to Version 3.2
New non-destructive layers "Link Layer" and "Vector Layer" are implemented.
Enhanced color selection function and UI/UX improvements were also added.

entries.title: UE5 rendering and optimization techniques, "Battlefield 6" development case study, and more. GPC 2025, a conference on graphics technology, with materials and archived videos of some of the presentations.
entries.title_ja: UE5のレンダリング・最適化手法や『Battlefield 6』開発事例など。グラフィックス技術のカンファレンス「GPC 2025」、一部講演の資料・アーカイブ動画が公開
entries.description:
Graphics Programming Conference 2025, a Conference Focusing on Graphics Technology, Presentation Materials and Archived Videos Now Available
Presentation materials are available for 30 lectures, including lectures on rendering and optimization techniques using Unreal Engine 5 and Cycles, the standard Blender renderer.
Eight archived videos are now available. including a lecture on "Battlefield 6" development case study.

InstaMAT" is free for projects with annual revenues of less than $100,000.

entries.title: KPOP Girls!" is the first game in the KPOP series. Demon Hunters" uses UE's real-time rendering for high-quality 3D scenes; Epic Games releases production interview article
entries.title_ja: 『KPOPガールズ! デーモン・ハンターズ』はUEのリアルタイムレンダリングで高品質の3Dシーンを実現。Epic Gamesが制作インタビュー記事を公開
entries.description:
3D Animated Film "KPOP Girls! Interview with the production team about the use of UE in "Demon Hunters," published by Epic Games.
UE's real-time rendering enables highly accurate pre-visualization. As a specific example, a case study of a battle scene in a public bathhouse created with Volumetric is presented.
The article also discusses efforts to automate the workflow of importing animation rigs created in Maya into UE.
